story: Nina studied all week for her exam. She slept well the night before. She arrived early and felt calm. She read each question carefully.

choices.label: A
choices.text: She finished the test and felt confident.

choices.label: B
choices.text: She forgot where the school was and never went inside.

label: A
answer: She finished the test and felt confident.

story: Tom left ice cream in the sun. He went inside to answer a call. He came back ten minutes later. The bowl was sticky and warm.

choices.label: B
choices.text: The ice cream became colder than before.

label: A
